title: CHIPSTACK
description:
A casino on your desktop that never stops paying.
CHIPSTACK is an idle casino overlay. It sits on your desktop, earns chips every second, and grows your bankroll whether you're playing or not. The more you have, the faster it grows. Leave it running while you work, jump in for a quick hand between tasks, or go deep configuring strategies and chasing modifier combos. No real money. No microtransactions. No ads. Just an ever-growing pile of chips.

 IDLE INCOME THAT COMPOUNDS
Your chipstack grows passively every second the game runs. Upgrade your income rate. Prestige to permanently multiply it — and it stacks every time you prestige. Even when CHIPSTACK is closed, you earn offline income. Open the game tomorrow to a bigger bankroll than you left.

 AUTO-PLAY YOUR WAY
Blackjack, slots, and roulette have full auto-play — but it plays with your bets, your strategy, and your rules.

Configure everything:

 • Set your bet amount or use percentage-of-bankroll sizing
 
• Choose a betting strategy — Flat, Martingale, Reverse Martingale, D'Alembert, Fibonacci, Percentage, or build a custom sequence
 
• Set stop conditions — stop on jackpot, balance drop %, profit target, spin count, or streak break
 
• Run at Normal, Fast (2x), or Turbo (5x) speed
 

 You're not watching a bot. You're building a system, tuning it, and watching it perform.

 CONFIGURE THE HOUSE RULES
 CHIPSTACK gives you full control over the rules of each game:

 Blackjack:
 • 1, 2, 4, 6, or 8 deck shoe
 
• 3:2 or 6:5 blackjack payout
 
• Hit Soft 17 or Stand on Soft 17
 
• American (dealer peeks) or European (no peek)
 
• Surrender on or off
 
• Live Hi-Lo card count with true count display
 

 Roulette:
 • European wheel — 37 pockets (0-36), 2.7% house edge
 
• American wheel — 38 pockets (0, 00, 1-36), 5.26% house edge
 
• Full bet grid — straights, splits, streets, corners, dozens, columns
 

 Slots:
 • 5 themes with different volatility profiles — Classic, Neon, Pharaoh, Cosmic, Dragon
 
• 1, 3, 5, or 8 active paylines
 
• Cascading reels, expanding wilds, sticky wilds, 4-tier progressive jackpot
 

 PLAY WITH MODS — OR WITHOUT
Toggle Classic Mode for a pure casino experience with real odds. Or equip up to 5 modifier cards that break the rules in your favor.

Collect 29 modifiers across 5 rarities:

 • Remove all 2s, 3s, and 4s from the blackjack deck
 
• Make skull symbols trigger bonus spins instead of losses
 
• Double the progressive jackpot build speed
 
• Get 50% of your bet back when roulette lands on zero
 
• Split any two cards, not just pairs
 

 Discover hidden synergy combos when the right modifiers are equipped together. Some combinations break the game wide open — if you can find them.

 LEARN REAL CARD COUNTING
CHIPSTACK uses real blackjack rules and real basic strategy. Turn on the Hi-Lo running count and true count display to learn how card counting works. Watch the auto-player make optimal decisions for every hand. Test betting systems across thousands of automated hands and see for yourself whether Martingale or Kelly Criterion actually works with your chosen house rules.

 THREE MORE GAMES BETWEEN TASKS
 Quick games that take 30 seconds to a few minutes — perfect for loading screens, queues, or while watching something:

 • Neon Heist — Flip tiles to find loot, dodge hidden alarms, escape with your haul. Four security levels. Push your luck or cash out safe.
 
• Video Poker — Jacks or Better 9/6 with hold and draw.
 
• Hi-Lo — Guess higher or lower. Build streak multipliers and cash out before you bust.
 

 PRESTIGE, CLIMB, COMPETE
Cash out your bankroll to prestige. Start over with a permanent income multiplier that compounds every time. Unlock Turbo speed, extra modifier slots, loss rebates, and the Casino Owner title. Compete on global Steam leaderboards for the highest chipstack, biggest single win, and longest win streak. Compare your bankroll with friends.

 EVERYTHING IN THE BOX
 • Desktop overlay — always on top, transparent background, drag anywhere
 
• Passive idle income that compounds the more you play
 
• 6 casino games — 3 with full auto-play, 3 for quick active play
 
• Deep auto-play with 7 betting strategies and configurable stop conditions
 
• Full house rule customization — decks, payouts, dealer rules, wheel type
 
• Classic Mode (real odds) or Modded (29 game-changing modifier cards)
 
• Real blackjack card counting with Hi-Lo running count and true count
 
• 5 slot themes with different volatility profiles
 
• Prestige system with compounding multipliers and 7 tier unlocks
 
• Speed modes — Normal, Fast (2x), Turbo (5x)
 
• 35 Steam achievements
 
• Global and friends leaderboards
 
• Daily challenges with bonus rewards
 
• Offline earnings while closed
 
• No real money. No microtransactions. No ads. Pure game.
 

CHIPSTACK is a game of chance for entertainment purposes only. All currency is virtual. No real-money gambling is offered or facilitated.
description_short: A desktop idle casino that runs while you game, queue, browse, or work — earning chips every second. Auto-play blackjack, slots, roulette with your bets and strategies. Plus 3 quick-play games like Video Poker. Toggle card counting, equip powerful mods or play pure, and chase the highest chipstack!
